failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the product evidence needed to answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the task and made the required ProductCatalogSearch call with the needed filters. At index 3, the tool returned an explicit timeout error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/connectivity failure, not a malformed invocation or reasoning error. The failure was not resolved later; the agent only reported that the task could not be completed.
